title: Reconcile Phoenix.LiveViewTest + sandbox + real assign_async tasks
prompt: Write `docs/liveview_assign_async_sandbox.md` explaining the complete flow of how a sandbox allowance reaches an `assign_async` task. Must include: (1) test process checks out sandbox → sandbox GenServer records the owner, (2) test calls `Plug.Test.init_test_session` + `get "/users"`, (3) the conn includes the Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox metadata in the response headers, (4) the subsequent `live(conn, ~p"/users")` establishes the LV socket with `:user_agent` connect_info, (5) on_mount(:sandbox) calls `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox.allow(metadata, adapter)`, (6) the LV process is now an allowed process, (7) `assign_async` spawns a Task VIA Task.async (NOT Task.Supervisor.async_nolink) which inherits `$callers` including the LV process, (8) the task's Repo call uses the LV process's allowance chain back to the test. Must explain why `Task.Supervisor.async_nolink` would BREAK the chain.
tier_rationale: End-to-end flow explanation across 8 steps. Requires synthesizing every piece of the integration.
